findings.message: Multiple public API entries are being removed, including AccessTokenResult constructor, RemoteAuthenticationService constructor, and the entire SignOutSessionStateManager class. This is a breaking change for consumers.
findings.suggestion: If these removals are intentional, ensure they are documented in a migration guide and that consumers have a clear upgrade path.

findings.message: Removal of the obsolete init setter for RendererId may break derived classes that were using the init accessor to set the renderer ID.
findings.suggestion: If the init setter is no longer needed, ensure that derived classes have an alternative way to set the renderer ID (e.g., via GetWebRendererId override).

findings.message: Removal of the obsolete InvokeJS<T0,T1,T2,TRes> method may break consumers that still depend on this backward-compatibility shim.
findings.suggestion: Ensure that all consumers have migrated to the new InvokeJSJson method before removing the obsolete method.

findings.message: Removal of fallback sign-out state validation may allow externally initiated logouts to bypass state validation when HistoryEntryState is null.
findings.suggestion: Restore the fallback check for SignOutManager.ValidateSignOutState() when Navigation.HistoryEntryState is null, or ensure that ValidateSignOutRequestState() covers both cases.

findings.message: Removing the null check for _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl can cause a NullReferenceException when _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl is null but InteractionOptions is not null.
findings.suggestion: Restore the null check for _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl before passing it to _navigation.NavigateToLogin, or ensure InteractiveRequestUrl is always non-null when InteractionOptions is set.

needs_human_review.message: Removal of test 'ObsoleteApiReturnsEditContextForChaining' without verifying that the obsolete API it tested is still functional or that its removal is covered elsewhere.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure the obsolete API 'AddDataAnnotationsValidation' is either removed or its behavior is covered by another test.

needs_human_review.message: Removed test 'AuthenticationManager_Logout_RedirectsToFailureOnInvalidSignOutState' without replacement, reducing coverage for the SignOutSessionStateManager flow. The test validated that an invalid sign-out state redirects to the logout-failed page with the correct error message.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure the removed scenario is covered by an existing or new test, or add a test that validates the behavior when SignOutSessionStateManager returns false for sign-out state.

needs_human_review.message: Removed registration of 'SignOutSessionStateManager' (marked obsolete) from DI. This is a breaking change for any consumer that depends on this service being available via DI, even if the type is obsolete.
needs_human_review.suggestion: If the service is no longer needed, ensure all internal consumers have been migrated. If external consumers may still rely on it, consider keeping the registration with an extended obsoletion message or providing a shim.

needs_human_review.message: Removed public method 'NotifyLocationChanged' which was marked obsolete but still part of the public API surface. This is a breaking change for any external caller that may still reference it.
needs_human_review.suggestion: If the method is no longer used internally and safe to remove, ensure no external consumers depend on it. Otherwise, keep the method with an updated obsoletion message.

discarded.message: Removal of SignOutSessionStateManager injection and its usage may break sign-out flow for existing consumers that rely on the obsolete but functional SignOutSessionStateManager.
discarded.suggestion: Ensure that the sign-out functionality previously provided by SignOutSessionStateManager is fully replaced by an alternative mechanism before removing the injection.

discarded.message: Added Task.Yield() before GetAuthenticationStateAsync may introduce an unnecessary async yield that could change timing behavior without clear justification.
discarded.suggestion: Remove the Task.Yield() call unless there is a documented reason to force a continuation asynchronously; consider using a direct call to GetAuthenticationStateAsync.

discarded.message: Replacing _tokenResult.RedirectUrl with _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl in the else branch changes the fallback navigation target, which may break existing callers that rely on RedirectUrl being used when InteractionOptions is null.
discarded.suggestion: Verify that InteractiveRequestUrl is always set when RedirectUrl was previously used, or keep the original RedirectUrl fallback to preserve backward compatibility.

/// Enables DataAnnotations validation support for the <see cref="EditContext"/>.
/// <returns>A disposable object whose disposal will remove DataAnnotations validation support from the <see cref="EditContext"/>.</returns>
[Obsolete("This API is obsolete and may be removed in future versions. Use the overload that accepts an IServiceProvider instead.")]
public static IDisposable EnableDataAnnotationsValidation(this EditContext editContext)
/// Enables DataAnnotations validation support for the <see cref="EditContext"/>.

/// Repesents configurable options for <see cref="BrowserFileStream"/> with Blazor Server.
[Obsolete("RemoteJSDataStream defaults are utilized instead of the options here.")]
/// Gets or sets the maximum segment size for file data sent over a SignalR circuit.
/// This only has an effect when using Blazor Server.
public int MaxSegmentSize { get; set; } = 20 * 1024; // SignalR limit is 32K.
/// Gets or sets the maximum internal buffer size for unread data sent over a SignalR circuit.
/// This only has an effect when using Blazor Server.
/// Gets or sets the time limit for fetching a segment of file data.
/// This only has an effect when using Blazor Server.
public TimeSpan SegmentFetchTimeout { get; set; } = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1);

// Ensure we're authenticated before proceeding with sign-out

/// Initialize a new instance of <see cref="SignOutSessionStateManager"/>.
/// Sets up some state in session storage to allow for logouts from within the <see cref="RemoteAuthenticationDefaults.LogoutPath"/> page.
/// <returns>A <see cref="ValueTask"/> that completes when the state has been saved to session storage.</returns>
[UnconditionalSuppressMessage("ReflectionAnalysis", "IL2026:RequiresUnreferencedCode", Justification = "The correct members will be preserved by the above DynamicDependency.")]
// This should use JSON source generation
/// Validates the existence of some state previously setup by <see cref="SetSignOutState"/> in session storage to allow
/// <returns>A <see cref="Task"/> that completes when the state has been validated and indicates the validity of the state.</returns>
[UnconditionalSuppressMessage("ReflectionAnalysis", "IL2026:RequiresUnreferencedCode", Justification = "The correct members will be preserved by the above DynamicDependency.")]
// This should use JSON source generation
private static SignOutState DeserializeSignOutState(string result) => JsonSerializer.Deserialize<SignOutState>(result, JsonSerializerOptions.Web);
public static readonly SignOutState Instance = new SignOutState { Local = true };

entity:src/Components/Web/src/WebRendere.message: Changed module src.Components.Web.src.WebRenderer touched by 1 hunk(s).

context_requests.reason: The primary evidence only shows the entity summary. Need diff hunks and line-level evidence to assess the actual code changes for review guidelines compliance.

keep.message: Multiple public API entries are being removed, including AccessTokenResult constructor, RemoteAuthenticationService constructor, and the entire SignOutSessionStateManager class. This is a breaking change for consumers.
keep.suggestion: If these removals are intentional, ensure they are documented in a migration guide and that consumers have a clear upgrade path.

keep.message: Removal of the obsolete init setter for RendererId may break derived classes that were using the init accessor to set the renderer ID.
keep.suggestion: If the init setter is no longer needed, ensure that derived classes have an alternative way to set the renderer ID (e.g., via GetWebRendererId override).

keep.message: Removal of the obsolete InvokeJS<T0,T1,T2,TRes> method may break consumers that still depend on this backward-compatibility shim.
keep.suggestion: Ensure that all consumers have migrated to the new InvokeJSJson method before removing the obsolete method.

keep.message: Removal of fallback sign-out state validation may allow externally initiated logouts to bypass state validation when HistoryEntryState is null.
keep.suggestion: Restore the fallback check for SignOutManager.ValidateSignOutState() when Navigation.HistoryEntryState is null, or ensure that ValidateSignOutRequestState() covers both cases.

keep.message: Removing the null check for _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl can cause a NullReferenceException when _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl is null but InteractionOptions is not null.
keep.suggestion: Restore the null check for _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl before passing it to _navigation.NavigateToLogin, or ensure InteractiveRequestUrl is always non-null when InteractionOptions is set.

keep.message: Removed null check for InteractiveRequestUrl before navigation, which can cause NullReferenceException when InteractionOptions is null and InteractiveRequestUrl is null.
keep.suggestion: Restore the null check for InteractiveRequestUrl before calling NavigateTo, or add a guard to ensure InteractiveRequestUrl is not null.

needs_human_review.message: Removal of test 'ObsoleteApiReturnsEditContextForChaining' without verifying that the obsolete API it tested is still functional or that its removal is covered elsewhere.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure the obsolete API 'AddDataAnnotationsValidation' is either removed or its behavior is covered by another test.

needs_human_review.message: Removed test 'AuthenticationManager_Logout_RedirectsToFailureOnInvalidSignOutState' without replacement, reducing coverage for the SignOutSessionStateManager flow. The test validated that an invalid sign-out state redirects to the logout-failed page with the correct error message.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure the removed scenario is covered by an existing or new test, or add a test that validates the behavior when SignOutSessionStateManager returns false for sign-out state.

needs_human_review.message: Removed registration of 'SignOutSessionStateManager' (marked obsolete) from DI. This is a breaking change for any consumer that depends on this service being available via DI, even if the type is obsolete.
needs_human_review.suggestion: If the service is no longer needed, ensure all internal consumers have been migrated. If external consumers may still rely on it, consider keeping the registration with an extended obsoletion message or providing a shim.

needs_human_review.message: Removed public method 'NotifyLocationChanged' which was marked obsolete but still part of the public API surface. This is a breaking change for any external caller that may still reference it.
needs_human_review.suggestion: If the method is no longer used internally and safe to remove, ensure no external consumers depend on it. Otherwise, keep the method with an updated obsoletion message.

discarded.message: Removal of SignOutSessionStateManager injection and its usage may break sign-out flow for existing consumers that rely on the obsolete but functional SignOutSessionStateManager.
discarded.suggestion: Ensure that the sign-out functionality previously provided by SignOutSessionStateManager is fully replaced by an alternative mechanism before removing the injection.

discarded.message: Added Task.Yield() before GetAuthenticationStateAsync may introduce an unnecessary async yield that could change timing behavior without clear justification.
discarded.suggestion: Remove the Task.Yield() call unless there is a documented reason to force a continuation asynchronously; consider using a direct call to GetAuthenticationStateAsync.

discarded.message: Replacing _tokenResult.RedirectUrl with _tokenResult.InteractiveRequestUrl in the else branch changes the fallback navigation target, which may break existing callers that rely on RedirectUrl being used when InteractionOptions is null.
discarded.suggestion: Verify that InteractiveRequestUrl is always set when RedirectUrl was previously used, or keep the original RedirectUrl fallback to preserve backward compatibility.
